name: video-controller
description: Video Controller - Real-time video playlist management system

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:cashier"
scripts.build: npm run build:agent && npm run build:server && npm run build:web && npm run build:cashier
scripts.install:all: cd agent && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../cashier && npm install
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:agent" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:cashier"
